_publications._publicationTitle: Notch signaling via Hey1 and Id2b regulates Müller glia's regenerative response to retinal injury.

_contextSnippet: Retinal injury in ubi:Cas9;u6:n3-gRNA fish resulted in an expanded zone of injury-responsive MG and increased MG proliferation without affecting retinal cell death
details: When combined with ubi:Cas9, retinal injury resulted in expanded zone of injury-responsive MG and increased MG proliferation without affecting retinal cell death
